summary: Discussed the sync for microservice migration and decided on refactoring auth-service from monolithic architecture to JWT + OAuth2.0, setting up CI/CD pipeline in GitHub Actions for automatic deployment on staging, conducting load testing with k6 for endpoint /api/v2/users (needing to handle 10k RPS), documenting OpenAPI spec for new endpoints after refactoring, setting up monitoring through Prometheus + Grafana for new services.

tasks.task: Refactor auth-service from monolithic architecture to JWT + OAuth2.0
Set up CI/CD pipeline in GitHub Actions for automatic deployment on staging
Conduct load testing with k6 for endpoint /api/v2/users (needing to handle 10k RPS)
Document OpenAPI spec for new endpoints after refactoring
Set up monitoring through Prometheus + Grafana for new services

decisions: Transition to gRPC for internal communication between services
Keep PostgreSQL and add Redis for session caching
Deploy all new services in a Kubernetes cluster
